title: Weekly Concept: Pulse Brief
objective: Tap the concept tiles in the exact pulse sequence to ship as many weekly briefs as possible before you run out of strikes.

controls.outcome: Correct taps lock in the brief and build combo

controls.input: Press and hold the preview button
controls.outcome: Spend a limited assist to hear and see the current sequence once more
Begins the next faster, longer pulse round

steps: A new weekly board appears with 4 concept tiles such as Hook, Color, Shape, and Mood.
The tiles pulse with light and distinct audio tones in a short sequence.
After the preview ends, replay the exact order by tapping the tiles.
Each cleared brief adds one pulse to future rounds and slightly shortens preview time and input time.
A wrong tap or expired timer costs a strike; after 3 strikes, the session ends and your leaderboard score is submitted locally for later syn
Every few rounds, a bonus brief appears with a faster beat and doubled combo value.
scoring: Score 100 points per correct tap and 300 bonus points for clearing a brief. Maintain a no-miss combo to raise a multiplier up to x5; bonus briefs add +1 temporary multiplier tier. Any mistake resets the combo, and the 3‑
tips: Listen as much as you look; each tile has its own tone.
Short, fast taps are safer than hesitating near the timer.
Use the preview assist only on long sequences, because assists are limited.
Bonus briefs are the best way to push leaderboard scores if your combo is already high.

trendContext.title: Weekly concept 1: brain teaser with playful pressure
